channel.title: REPO: Home Assistant on DVB Engineering Lab
channel.description: Recent content in REPO: Home Assistant on DVB Engineering Lab

item.title: Introduction
item.description:
Started working on a homeassistant dashboard on a raspberry pi 5. I chose HA docker over HAOS because I wanted to be able to use the raspberry pi both for running homeassistant, and acting as a display for the actual dashboard.

The dashboard is starting to look nice, however I got a lot of stabiliy issues between diffrent docker containers, at this point I might just use a second Pi and start running HAOS.
